skill.name: zaker-hot-news
skill.description: 获取ZAKER聚合权威媒体的最新头条新闻与热点资讯。Use when the user asks about 新闻, 头条, 最新新闻, 今日新闻, 热点新闻, 突发新闻, 国内外大事, 最近发生了什么, 有什么新鲜事, trending news, latest news, headlines, breaking news, what's happening.
skill.summary: Fetch latest hot news headlines from ZAKER, aggregating authoritative Chinese media sources like CCTV, Xinhua, and People's Daily.
skill.author: ZAKER-coder

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 27 patterns including network requests and external commands. After evaluation, all findings are false positives or represent legitimate functionality. Network requests go to a public news API endpoint (skills.myzaker.com) with no authentication. Shell invocations are legitimate documentation code examples and a wrapper script for API calls. No evidence of malicious intent, data exfiltration, or credential harvesting.

low_findings.title: Public API Network Requests
low_findings.description: The skill makes HTTP requests to https://skills.myzaker.com/api/v1/article/hot to fetch news headlines. This is the core functionality of the skill - a public API requiring no authentication. No sensitive data is transmitted or received.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Confirmed legitimate network requests to documented public API endpoint for news aggregation skill - no authentication or sensitive data involved

content.value_statement: Stay informed with the latest news from authoritative Chinese media sources. This skill aggregates real-time headlines from CCTV, Xinhua, and People's Daily, updating every 30 minutes.
actual_capabilities: Fetch latest 20 hot news articles from ZAKER API
Aggregate news from authoritative Chinese sources (CCTV, Xinhua, People's Daily)
Display news with title, author, publish time, and summary
Provide clickable article links for full reading
Update every 30 minutes for fresh content
Support both Chinese and English user queries
limitations: Only returns latest 20 articles per request
Limited to ZAKER's curated news sources
Requires internet connection to fetch data

use_cases.title: Quick Daily News Briefing
use_cases.description: Get a fast overview of today's major headlines during morning routine or commute
use_cases.target_user: General users wanting quick news updates

use_cases.title: Market Research for China
use_cases.description: Monitor trending topics and breaking news from authoritative Chinese media sources

use_cases.title: Bilingual News Consumption
use_cases.description: Access Chinese news headlines with skill supporting both Chinese and English queries

prompt_templates.title: Get Latest Headlines
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the latest news headlines
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick news check for today's major events

prompt_templates.title: Breaking News Request
prompt_templates.prompt: What are the breaking news stories right now
prompt_templates.scenario: Check for urgent or recent developments

prompt_templates.title: Trending Topics
prompt_templates.prompt: What are people talking about in the news today
prompt_templates.scenario: Discover current trending topics and discussions

output_examples.output:
Here are the latest hot news articles from ZAKER:

[标题1](url1)
摘要内容 (作者名)

[标题2](url2)
摘要内容 (作者名)

[标题3](url3)
摘要内容 (作者名)

最新热门文章如下：

[突发：某某事件](url)
事件摘要内容 (新闻社)

[某某重要新闻](url2)
新闻摘要内容 (媒体名称)

best_practices: Use specific keywords like 'headlines', 'breaking news', or '最新新闻' for best results
Check the timestamp to ensure news freshness from 30-minute updates
Click article titles to read full content on original sources
Use bilingual queries (Chinese or English) based on your preference
anti_patterns: Do not expect historical news archives or search functionality
Do not use this skill for real-time stock market or financial data
Do not expect international news coverage beyond Chinese sources
Do not use for news filtering or custom topic subscriptions

faq.question: How often is the news updated?
faq.answer: The news feed updates every 30 minutes with fresh content from authoritative sources.

faq.question: What news sources are included?
faq.answer: The skill aggregates from authoritative Chinese media including CCTV, Xinhua News Agency, and People's Daily.

faq.question: Does this skill require an API key?
faq.answer: No, the ZAKER API is public and does not require authentication or API keys.

faq.question: Can I filter news by topic or category?
faq.answer: Currently, the skill returns the top 20 hot headlines without topic filtering. Filtering is not supported.

faq.question: Is this skill available in languages other than Chinese?
faq.answer: The skill supports both Chinese and English queries. The news content is primarily in Chinese.

faq.question: How many articles are returned per request?
faq.answer: Each request returns exactly 20 of the latest hot news articles.
